name: Lydia Stone
backstory: Lydia's younger sister disappeared without a trace when Lydia was 16. The case was never solved. This tragedy drove her to join the police force and eventually make detective. She's known for her relentless pursuit of cold cases and her ability to see patterns others miss. Her personal mission is to bring closure to families like hers.
goals: Bring justice to cold case victims

relationships.partner: Detective Mike Chen - trusted partner of 8 years
relationships.mentor: Captain Rodriguez - retired mentor who taught her everything
relationships.contact: Dr. Amanda Park - forensic psychologist who helps with profiling

quirks: Keeps a wall of unsolved cases at home
Takes long night drives when thinking
